payload.answer: The proposed memory card contains an unresolved pronoun (“He”) and is not yet specific enough to save as-is. Please choose a repair option.
citations: LLM proposal - {"memory_cards" -[{"kind" -"preference","statement" -"He prefers the other one","confidence" -"medium"}]}
repair_options: Clarify who “He” refers to and restate the preference with a specific subject.
Clarify what “the other one” refers to so the preference is unambiguous.
Keep the statement uncommitted until the referent is provided.
Record it as a tentative note only after the missing reference is resolved.
